atlascorporatepensions.note: Adverse-media screening flags governance and sanctions-control signals tied to Atlas Corporate Pensions.
atlascorporatepensions.summary_line: Two recent governance and sanctions-control items remain relevant for analyst review.

records.headline: Atlas Corporate Pensions named in sanctions-control remediation review
records.summary: Enhanced due-diligence actions were noted after ownership and payments controls were escalated for compliance review.

records.headline: Atlas pension vehicle linked to repeated governance questions
records.summary: Recurring ownership-transparency questions and delayed KYC remediation milestones were highlighted.

records.headline: Bavarian Industrial Fund expands onboarding checks for cross-border counterparties
records.summary: Additional onboarding checks were noted after a related-party name-similarity review.
